entry.title: New: RES25-150 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE DIRECTOR OF BUDGET AND FISCAL SERVICES TO ISSUE AND SELL IN ONE OR MORE SERIES NOT TO EXCEED $11,000,000 PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU FOR FINANCING THE AMOUNT APPROPRIATED IN ORDINANCE NO. 25-39 (ALSO REFERRED TO, UPON ITS APPROVAL, AS BILL 23 (2025), AND AS MAY BE FURTHER AMENDED) OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU FOR THE PURPOSE OF FINANCING CAPITAL COSTS OF THE HONOLULU RAIL TRANSIT PROJECT.

Recommendation of the adoption of the Resolution authorizing the issuance and sale not to exceed principal amount of General Obligation Bonds to finance the capital costs of the Honolulu Rail Transit Project ("HRTP").

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
